channel.title: AI on Chase the Devil
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Chase the Devil

item.title: Deep Neural Networks and Julia
item.description: Recently, I have spent some time on simple neural networks. The idea is to employ them as universal function approximators for some problems appearing in quantitative finance. There are some great papers on it such as the one from Liu et al. (2019) or Horvath et al. (2019) Deep Learning Volatility or Rosenbaum & Zhang (2021). Incidentally, I met Liu back when I was finishing my PhD in TU Delft around 2020.
